Tasks.acceptedSubtitle: She is joining your household and will be able to receive missions.
Tasks.completedNote: Everything went well, the apartment was clean and tidy.
Tasks.problemNote: I found a broken glass in the living room and stains on the sofa. I have taken photos.
Tasks.refusedSubtitle: No worries, choose another housekeeper for this cleaning.
Tasks.rescheduleSubtitle: Please select a new date for this cleaning mission.
Tasks.noProof: The housekeeper has not submitted any proof yet.
Tasks.validateCleaningDesc: Approve the work to release the payment to the housekeeper.
Tasks.rejectDesc: Tell the housekeeper what needs to be redone. The job goes back to them.
Tasks.rejectReasonPlaceholder: Ex: The kitchen floor was not cleaned…
Tasks.awaitingProof: Waiting for the housekeeper to finish and submit proof.
Tasks.notFound: This cleaning could not be found.
Tasks.payNowHint: The job is complete but payment is still pending. Pay now to release the funds to the housekeeper.
Tasks.handcashPendingHint: Awaiting cleaner to approve hand cash receipt.
